texto: There are women who make things better... simply by showing up. There are women who make things happen. There are women who make their way. There are women who make a difference. And women who make us smile. There are women of wit and wisdom who- through strength and courage- make it through. There are women who change the world everyday... Women like you.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Ashley Rice: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de esforço, persistência e resultados. O trecho “There are women who make things better... simply by showing up. There are women who make things h…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que sabedoria, change, strength pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de mudanca e strength.
